mission.title: argo-workflows: Have dropdown-lists and checkboxes for workflow inputs in GUI
mission.description: Have dropdown-lists and checkboxes for workflow inputs in GUI. Requested by 31+ users.

steps.title: Check current argo-workflows deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo-workflows version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
helm list -n argo-workflows 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo-workflows installation.

steps.title: Review argo-workflows configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-workflows configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get configmap -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-workflows
```
# Summary
It would be nice if there are more GUI features for input parameters (i.e. `spec.arguments.parameters`).

steps.title: Apply the fix for Have dropdown-lists and checkboxes for workflow inputs in…
steps.description:
Use the `enum` field on workflow parameters to render dropdown selections in the Argo Workflows UI. For boolean parameters, the UI automatically renders checkboxes:
```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: WorkflowTemplate
metadata:
  name: workflow-template-with-enum-values
spec:
  entrypoint: argosay
  arguments:
    parameters:
      - name: message
        value: one
        enum:
          - one
          - two
          - three
  templates:
  - name: argosay
    inputs:
      parameters:
        - name: message
          value: '{{workflow.parameters.message}}'
    container:
      image: 'argoproj/argosay:v2'
      command: [/argosay]
      args: [echo, '{{inputs.parameters.message}}']
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get events -n argo-workflows --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Have dropdown-lists and checkboxes for workflow inputs in…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Added enum field support for workflow parameters, which renders dropdown selections in the UI. Boolean parameters render as checkboxes. WorkflowTemplates and CronWorkflows also support the enum field.
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Workflow
metadata:
  generateName: example-
spec:
  entrypoint: main
  arguments:
    parameters:
    - name: workflow-param-1
      type: boolean  # would then be presented as a checkbox in GUI
      value: true
    - name: workflow-param-2
      type: list  # would then be presented as a dropdown-list in GUI
      options: ("option1" "option2" "option3")
      value: ("option1" "option2")
  templates:
  - name: main
    dag:
      tasks:
      - name: step-A 
        template: step-template-A
        arguments:
          parameters:
          - name: template-param-1
            value: "{{workflow.parameters.workflow-param-1}}"
...

apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: WorkflowTemplate
metadata:
  name: workflow-template-with-enum-values
spec:
  entrypoint: argosay
  arguments:
    parameters:
      - name: message
        value: one
        enum:
          -   one
          -   two
          -   three
  templates:
    - name: argosay
      inputs:
        parameters:
          - name: message
            value: '{{workflow.parameters.message}}'
      container:
        name: main
        image: 'argoproj/argosay:v2'
        command:
          - /argosay
        args:
          - echo
          - '{{inputs.parameters.message}}'

spec:
  entrypoint: argosay
  arguments:
    parameters:
      - name: message
        value: one
        ui:
            enum:
              -   one
              -   two
              -   three
            separator: ","

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-workflows installed or the issue environment reproducible.
